$comment: Manifest for fern/scripts/sync_deps.py — the list of DEP bodies to pull
into docs/proposals/_generated/ at Fern build time. This repo NEVER commits
the DEP body itself; only this manifest, the sync script, and the generated
dep             DEP number (rendered on the metadata card and in the H1 eyebrow)
subtitle        optional subtitle rendered under the H1 title
pr              PR number to link + mirror comments from
tracking_issue  issue number (int) for the 'Design discussion' thread — omit to show empty state
tracking_issue_url  URL for the 'Tracking issue' action button on the metadata card
source          { owner, repo, ref, path } — raw.githubusercontent.com coordinates

deps.subtitle: Build-time synced mirror of ai-dynamo/enhancements#61 — a transport-agnostic active messaging layer for Dynamo.
